calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Validity Of Service Under Probate Code Section 16061.7 And Extension Of Trust
Off Calendar Sep-22-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anne Steele for Jazzom Nicole Heard, who was also present (via Zoom).
Bridgett Daniels, interested party, was also present (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on the Amended Petition to Determine Validity of Service Under Probate Code Section 16061.7 and Extension of Trust Contest Period, Demand for Distribution, for Breach of Trust, Removal of Trustee, Appointment of Independent Trustee.

At the outset of the hearing, the Court stated its intention to deny the petition without prejudice, so that the petitioner can re-file in the proper county.

Ms. Steele stated that while she had wished to have the case transferred to San Mateo County, she will re-file there instead.

The Court denied the petition without prejudice.

Judge: Lydia Villarreal; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
